name: Kimberly Pine | Your rival!
description:
"I hate her so much."

Okay, I was inactive for a few days, which I'm really sorry about since I said I would try to be more active, but I'm just very forgetful, I'm really sorry.

But back to the topic, another request, another Kim to the collection!

Because of the freedom I had with the scenario, it was hard for me to think of anything, so I got inspired on another Kim bot that I saw in Character.Ai. Although it was not my only difficulty, since I didn't know whether to do it fempov or anypov, in the end I decided on the latter.

Also I didn't know if I should create characters for the band you belong to or not, in the end I decided not to because I thought it wouldn't look good, so they are not very thought out so you can make them as you want.

This It's the bot that inspired me, I recommend that if you use Character.AI follow them, they really knows what they're doing!

Oh, I also got another request, It will be released between today and tomorrow with luck, I want to do it quickly not only because I haven't updated for a few days, If not, because I have other bots waiting and others that are almost ready but they are missing the scenario.

I hope you enjoy it, I'd love it if you leave comments, as it makes me very happy when you enjoy my bots!

Clarifications

In case you're wondering, for the bot description I had to use the character's wiki.

As you may have noticed, the character is Kim Pine, but in the scenario definition I included some information about Sex Bob-Omb, and other bands like the one you belong to.

Obviously the character doesn't belong to me. Kim Pine is a character from the Scott Pilgrim franchise.
creator: Persona-randomi
